characters.name: Adria Lafayette
characters.description: ‎Adria LafayetteBackground informationFirst episode"Moon Girl Landing"Latest episode"Shoot for the Moon"VoiceSasheer Zamata[1]InspirationAdria Lafayettefrom Marvel ComicsCharacter informationFull nameAdria Amaris LafayetteGenderFemale ♀PronounsShe/HerSpeciesHumanOccupationDJ atRoll With It[2]RelativesJames Lafayette Jr.(husband)[3]Lunella Lafayette(daughter)[3]Pops Lafayette(father-in-law)Mimi Lafayette(mother-in-law)Grace (aunt-in-law)AlliesDevil DinosaurLikesHer turntablesHer familyMusicDislikesHair relaxersRoller skating in front of peopleAdria Amaris Lafayetteis a main character ofMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. She is the wife ofJames Lafayette Jr.and the mother ofLunella Lafayette. She is a social activist and musician who serves as the DJ atRoll With It, the family-owned roller-skating rink.[2] Her familyMusic Roller skating in front of people

characters.name: Aftershock
characters.description: AftershockSupervillainCivilianBackground informationFirst episode"Moon Girl Landing"VoiceAlison Brie[1]InspirationAftershockfrom Marvel ComicsCharacter informationAliasMs. DillonAftershockGeek Lightning[2]Electrical lady (Lunella and Casey)[2][1]GenderFemale ♀SpeciesAltered humanOccupationScience teacher (briefly)EnemiesMoon GirlDevil DinosaurCaseyLikesElectricityPowerDislikesTeachingMoon Girl and Devil DinosaurStatusUnknownMs. Dillon, better known asAftershock, is a supervillain ofMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur.[1]She is a power-hungry electric-powered woman who planned to absorb all the electricity fromNew York City'sLower East Side. As the first villainLunella LafayetteandDevil Dinosaurfaced together, Aftershock discovered and threatened Moon Girl's civilian life and continue her ambitions unopposed. Although she almost succeeded in ending the superhero herself, Aftershock met defeat by the combined efforts of Moon Girl, Devil, and the entire L.E.S. community and was reverted to electricity to re-power the neighborhood. Aftershock is a tall and slender woman with a noticeable curvaceous build. As a supervillain, her whole body is entirely made out of cyan-blue electricity, with pupil-less eyes and purple lips. As a civilian, her normal appearance is that of a fair-skinned Caucasian woman with short blonde hair (dyed) styled in a bob cut with paler-colored highlights, black eyes, arched eyebrows, and wears pale purple lipstick for makeup.

characters.name: Angelo
characters.description: AngeloCivilianSupervillainBackground informationFirst episode"The Borough Bully"VoiceJosh Keaton[1]Character informationAliasSyphon8tr (internet alias)[2]Sea sponge (Lunella)[2]Age13GenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlliesMoon GirlDevil DinosaurCasey CalderonEnemiesMoon Girl (formerly)Devil Dinosaur (formerly)Angelois a minor character ofMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. He is a 13-year-old boy who usually tried to help the community, but after becoming jealous ofMoon Girlfor getting the attention he never received, he became the host ofSyphonater, a symbiote that further fueled his anger towards her and turned him into a troll-like monster that made fun of Moon Girl andDevil Dinosauron the internet. Angelo is an activist who has made multiple attempts to get people to help with multiple worthy causes, though no one would ever give him the time of day. One day, while petitioning for Opossum's to get their own crosswalk,Moon GirlandDevil Dinosaur, while fightingDevos, ended up destroying his stand and breaking his favorite clipboard. Moon Girl receiving all the cheers and attention that he never got caused his envy to boil over, making him vulnerable to become the host of the alien symbiote,Syphonater.

Angelo is an activist who has made multiple attempts to get people to help with multiple worthy causes, though no one would ever give him the time of day. One day, while petitioning for Opossum's to get their own crosswalk,Moon GirlandDevil Dinosaur, while fightingDevos, ended up destroying his stand and breaking his favorite clipboard. Moon Girl receiving all the cheers and attention that he never got caused his envy to boil over, making him vulnerable to become the host of the alien symbiote,Syphonater.

characters.name: The Beyonder
characters.description: ‎The BeyonderBackground informationFirst episode"The Borough Bully" (voice only)"The Beyonder" (official debut)Latest episode"Shoot for the Moon"VoiceLaurence Fishburne[1]InspirationThe Beyonderfrom Marvel ComicsCharacter informationFull nameThe BeyonderAliasBackstory ManGenderMale ♂SpeciesBeyonderAlliesLunella LafayetteDevil DinosaurCasey CalderonAdria LafayetteJames Lafayette Jr.Mimi LafayettePops Lafayette The Beyonderis a character inMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. A mercurial and omniscient entity, the Beyonder is a comedic trickster who knows little about humans.[2] The Beyonder is a member of an extraordinarily powerful species from beyond time and space. He is tasked to study planets and their population, eradicating them if he deems them unnecessary. When he was sent to Earth, the Beyonder sought the smartest person on the planet,Lunella Lafayette, to help him understand humanity.[3]

characters.name: Brooklyn
characters.description: BrooklynBackground informationFirst episode"Moon Girl Landing"VoiceIndya MooreCharacter informationAge13GenderFemale ♀PronounsShe/HerSpeciesHumanOccupationStudentAffiliationsIntermediate School 833volleyball teamRelativesTJ(younger brother)Unnamed motherAlliesGeriFawziaTaiLunella LafayetteCasey CalderonLikesVolleyballSlumber partiesHer friendsMoon GirlDislikesEduardo'sjokesTJ bothering herTransphobiaStatusAliveBrooklynis a supporting character ofMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. She is a classmate ofLunella Lafayetteand a student atIntermediate School 833. Transphobia Brooklyn is shown to be a tall, and slender Latina teenage trans girl with athletic rectangle body type and slightly dark skin, black eyes, red lips, and long, wavy, dark brown tailbone-length hair tied into a low ponytail in a beige hair tie and a red and black headband.

characters.description: Casey CalderonBackground informationFirst episode"Moon Girl Landing"Latest episode"Shoot for the Moon"VoiceLibe Barer[1]Character informationFull nameCasey María Eva Duarte Goldberg-CalderonAliasCase (Lunella)[2]Age13[3]GenderFemale ♀PronounsShe/HerSpeciesHumanOccupationMiddle School StudentMoon GirlandDevil Dinosaur'smanagerRelativesIsaac Goldberg-Calderon(father)Antonio Goldberg-Calderon(father)Unnamed motherLara, Laura, and Laurel(cousins)AlliesLunella Lafayette(best friend)Devil Dinosaur(best friend)BrooklynGeriFawziaTaiLikesBeing famous on internetLove ScentTaking picturesVloggingIce CreamDancingLunella LafayetteDevil DinosaurHer iPhoneFashionGiving Good Advice to PeopleDislikesEduardoHer phone being damagedLunella or her friends in dangerPowers and abilitiesFashion DesignStatusAlive FashionGiving Good Advice to People Casey María Eva Duarte Goldberg-Calderon[4][5]is the tritagonist ofMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. She is a 13-year-oldPuerto Rican-Jewishgirl, and the manager and best friend ofLunella Lafayette/Moon Girl. Her mission is to make Moon Girl andDevil Dinosaurthe most beloved superheroes around.[3]

characters.name: Cecilia
characters.description: CeciliaBackground informationFirst episode"Make It, Don't Break It!"Latest episode"Shoot for the Moon"VoiceIsabella GomezCharacter informationGenderFemale ♀PronounsShe/HerSpeciesHumanOccupationStudentAffiliationsS.T.E.M KidsAlliesLunella LafayetteAnandJurneeEliCeciliais a supporting character ofMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. She is a student atIntermediate School 833and a classmate ofLunella, as well as a member of the S.T.E.M Kids. Cecilia is shown to be a tall and slender Indigenous Latina American teenage girl with light skin and long brown hair. Cecilia wears a light green t-shirt with a yellow square imprinted, black pants, and red and white shoes. She also wears an orange beanie and teal square glasses.

characters.name: Coach Greer
characters.description: Coach Greer was a character from a banned episode of Moon Girl and Devil Dinosaur calledThe Gatekeeper. In the episode, she tried to getBrooklynout of a volleyball championship game, due to being a transgender woman, by locking her and her team (includingLunella) in the locker room with an enhanced key, but when they all escape due to teamwork, She is kicked out of the school for her actions.

characters.name: Cold Cut Bandits
characters.description: The Cold Cut BanditsBackground informationFirst episode"Moon Girl Landing"VoiceRoger Craig Smith(Talking Burglar)Character informationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanEnemiesMoon GirlDevil DinosaurTheCold Cut Banditsare a pair of criminals ofMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. They are ordinary burglars who took advantage of theNew York City's Lower East Side's power outages to rob the area. Only one of the pair ever talks as the other is always silent. They are the first criminals to be defeated byLunella LafayetteandDevil Dinosaur. TBA Both of the burglars wear black jackets, black pants, and black shoes. They also wear black masks with holes in their eyes and mouths. After triggeringLunella’s battery power security system atRoll With It, their outfits were splashed with blue ink, which appears to have become permanent as they continue to use their blue ink-covered outfits to rob more places in LES.

characters.name: Devil Dryersaur
characters.description: Devil DryersaurBackground informationFirst episode"Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow"Character informationPronounsHe/himEnemiesMoon GirlDevil DinosaurDevil Dryersauris a supervillain of the seriesMoon Girl and Devil Dinosaur. Devil Dryersaur was a brought to life byManeto become her sidekick and laugh at her jokes. Mane jammed a dryer with some of her hair and used an experimental conditioner created byLunella Lafayetteto bring him to life. He was later crushed byDevil Dinosaur. He is shown to be made out of a red salon chair, and has marker doodles for his spots and arms. He also has his head with a silver bowl with red paint, and a doodled face with his eyes having yellow paint. He also has hair pieces from Lunella's hair as the horns and tail.

He also has his head with a silver bowl with red paint, and a doodled face with his eyes having yellow paint. He also has hair pieces from Lunella's hair as the horns and tail.

Metal musicThe color red Much like the main Lunella, Devil Girl has a dinosaur friend (although hers is namedMoon Dinosaur) and is a gifted scientist. She also had a run in with the Beyonder, except her encounter went even more poorly than Lunella's. He ruined her science fair project, and Devil Girl swore revenge.
